title: BoxLegend Vacuum Storage Bags 6 Pieces 70 x 50cm Vacuum Bag Clothes Vacuum Storage Bag Travel Reusable and Durable for Clothes, Duvets, Bedding, Pillows Coats
features: [6 Medium Bags] The Compression Sealer Bags include 6 Medium compression bags (70 x 50cm) for storing your duvets, blankets, pillows or clothes for different seasons. They are great helpers for your storage, traveling and home moving.
[Save 3-8X Space] The 6 vacuum storage bags sets help you save 30%- 80% of storage space. You will get more storage place for your suitcase, closets, basements, lofts and garages.
[Great Airtight Effect] The Double-Zip Seal and Triple-Seal Turbo Valve can better avoid air from getting in again, keeping long-term vacuum effect.

[Thickened Material] These airtight bags are made of PA+PE material and the thickness of the vacuum bags is increased to 80 microns instead of 70 microns, prevent air leakage and will not tear when squeezed.
[Protect Clothing] With our vacuum bags, the textiles will be protected from dust, moisture. No matter in the basement or under the bed, the contents of the bags remain 100% clean and dry.
description: Product Description BoxLegend Vacuum Bags can be your best helper for HOME and TRAVEL! Do you want more space for your closet or suitcase? Do you want to better store your clothes and sheets when the season changes? Are you still looking for stronger and thicker vacuum bags? Note: 1. Use the clip to seal the zipper back and forth 3-4 times. 2. Open the blue cover of the turbo valve and use a vacuum cleaner to suck the air. Please do not remove the pink air cushion. 3. Close the blue lid immediately after pumping. 4. Make sure the zipper and blue lid are completely sealed and the vacuum bag does not leak. Multiple Seal Double seal zipper and triple seal turbo valve can keep airtight, waterproof, dustproof, better protect clothes, bedding, pillows, blankets. NOTE: You don't need to take out the pink air cushion to extract the air when you open the turbo valve cover. Pink air cushion helps improve air tightness. MAXIMIZE STORAGE SPACE Boxlegend Space Saving Bags can help you reduce the volume of clothing, bedding, duvets, hoodies or seasonal clothing by up to 80%.
